My friend and I each had a scoop of ice cream in a cup.  The price was outrageous. $10.50 for one scoop.  The worst part they use grocery store bought ice cream . Breyers is a source. . A very ordinary mediocre brand and very inexpensive.  Tourists are being taken advantage of.

I love Ghirardelli chocolate, bought the usual bits to take home but thought we’d get a sundae after. The cafe part was really dirty, sloppy icecream all over the tables, chairs, floors. Empty rubbish all over. 
The icecream was nice but the experience wasnt great due to the cleanliness. Better off sitting outside

Beautiful place, well cleaned.At the entrance there is a market area where you can buy loose chocolates or even bars. 
In another area you could eat sitting at the table or even to take away preparations. All very nice, but I found the prices very expensive, both for chocolates and drinks
